channel.title: Noticias Forex — Global Investing
channel.description: Noticias forex de alto impacto en tiempo real con análisis fundamental para las 8 divisas G8.

item.title: Stocks Settle Lower as Iran War Boosts Crude Oil and Bond Yields
item.description: The S P 500 Index ($SPX ) (SPY ) on Tuesday closed down -0.37%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI ) (DIA ) closed down -0.18%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX ) (QQQ ) closed down -0.77%. June E-mini S P futures (ESM26 ) fell -0.35%, and June E-mini Nasdaq futures... Fuente: Nasdaq FX

item.title: The USD continues the consolidation and waits for the next shove
item.description: US stocks are higher, yields are back down after moving higher yesterday, and oil prices are lower. The USD meanwhile is confined in trading and little changed awaiting the next shove. Overnight, Iran said that they would allow "non-hostile" ships through the Strait of Hormuz" which is leading the the reversal in stocks and yields and oil. In the v... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: ECB: Divergent energy shock response scenarios – Nomura
item.description: Nomura analysts note that markets currently price around three rate hikes for the European Central Bank (ECB) by December 2026, implying a similar response to the Iran war energy shock as the Bank of England (BoE). Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: investingLive European markets wrap: Oil down, risk mood picks up on hopeful optimism
item.description: Headlines: Trump successfully capped the upside in oil, raising market hopes for an end to the war Oil holds near the lows for the week though the drums of war continue to beat US futures push higher so far today, technical breakdown on hold for now Gold recovers some ground as hopes for the end of the US-Iran war drive prices higher Iran's ambassa... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: German Ifo Business Sentiment Drops as Iran War Hits Confidence
item.description: Germany’s Ifo Business Climate index deteriorated in March, falling from 88.4 to 86.4, as the escalation in the Middle East weighed heavily on corporate sentiment. The decline was driven by a notable drop in expectations, which fell from 90.2 to 86.0, while the current situation index remained unchanged at 86.7. The weakness was broad-based across ... Fuente: ActionForex

item.title: EURUSD pulls back into a major trendline as focus turns to US-Iran negotiations
item.description: FUNDAMENTAL OVERVIEW USD: The US dollar remains under pressure amid optimistic expectations for an end to the US-Iran war. The catalyst for these expectations was Trump’s announcement on Truth Social on Monday of a five-day ceasefire aimed at paving the way for “a complete and total resolution of the hostilities”. The greenback hasn’t yet fallen to... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: ECB: Wait-and-see for second-round effects from energy shock – TD Securities
item.description: TD Securities notes that President Lagarde used the ECB and Its Watchers conference to outline how the Governing Council is assessing the Middle East conflict shock. The bank says the ECB is effectively playing for time, watching selling price expectations and wage trackers. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: BoE: War-driven inflation outlook reshapes rate path – Nomura
item.description: Nomura’s Global Markets Research team notes UK CPI inflation held at 3.0% year-on-year in February, matching Bank of England (BoE) forecasts. Services inflation stayed sticky, but core measures eased slightly. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: ECB’s Lane: Inflation readings could be higher in March and April
item.description: European Central Bank (ECB) Chief Economist Philip Lane warned of higher inflationary pressures in the Eurozone in the next two months during European trading hours at the ECB and its Watchers conference at Goethe University in Frankfurt on Wednesday. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: ECB's Lane: We will be considering at every meeting what the scenario is
item.description: We will be considering at every meeting what the scenario is Drop in consumer confidence was quite big You can see downturn in PMIs Inflation expectations show significant effect for first year, then smaller The market dynamic suggests a price-level jump Understanding selling price expectations will be important Wage tracker is a good leading indic... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Trump successfully capped the upside in oil, raising market hopes for an end to the war
item.description: FUNDAMENTAL OVERVIEW Oil prices have eased significantly on Monday after Trump announced on his Truth Social account a five-day ceasefire aimed at paving the way for “a complete and total resolution of the hostilities”. However, the selloff lost momentum as Iran denied Trump’s claims. Nevertheless, the hope for the end of the war remained given Tru... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: USD/CHF Price Forecast: Consolidates around 0.7900; near-term outlook remains bullish
item.description: The USD/CHF pair trades in a tight range around 0.7900 during the European trading session on Wednesday. The Swiss Franc pair trades calmly as the US Dollar (USD) turns sideways, with investors awaiting the response from Iran over United States (US) President Donald Trump’s 15-point settlement plan. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: BoE: Hawks keep hike risk alive – ING
item.description: ING’s Chris Turner notes that February UK CPI was broadly in line, but stronger services inflation and higher energy prices keep Bank of England (BoE) hawks vigilant. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: GBP/USD Price Forecast: Traders seem hesitant amid hawkish Fed and BoE expectations
item.description: The GBP/USD pair continues with its struggle to make it through a technically significant 200-day Simple Moving Average (SMA) and seesaws between tepid gains/minor losses through the first half of the European session on Wednesday. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: ECB president Lagarde: Monetary policy cannot bring down energy prices
item.description: If this event had been held a few weeks ago, my speech would have been very different But we find ourselves yet again in a different world We are facing profound uncertainty about the path of the economy None of us can resolve the uncertainty about how the war in Iran will play out Our response will be rooted in our monetary policy strategy, which ... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Germany March Ifo business climate index 86.4 vs 86.1 expected
item.description: Prior 88.6; revised to 88.4 Current conditions 86.7 vs 86.0 expected Prior 86.7 Expectations 86.0 vs 86.0 expected Prior 90.5; revised to 90.2 German business sentiment falls in March and that is not all too surprising considering the Middle East developments. The outlook/expectations index also dips back lower, falling to its weakest since Februar... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: RBA: Energy shock keeps inflation risks elevated – UOB
item.description: UOB Economist Lee Sue Ann expects the Reserve Bank of Australia (RBA) to keep the cash rate at 4.10% through 4Q26, after a split decision hike in March driven by Iran-related energy shocks and a strong labour market. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Lagarde speech: Economy may be more-quick to adjust if inflation rises
item.description: European Central Bank (ECB) President Christine Lagarde signaled at the ECB and its Watchers conference at Goethe University in Frankfurt during European trading hours on Wednesday that the central bank is ready for monetary policy adjustments if inflation proves stronger. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Iran's ambassador to Pakistan reaffirms that there was no talks between US and Iran
item.description: There have been no talks between the US and Iran, either directly or indirectly Friendly countries like Pakistan are seeking to lay the groundwork for dialogue between Tehran and Washington Hopes that these efforts could help in ending the war The comments here are coming after a report that two Pakistani officials told the AP that Iran has receive... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: USD/JPY: Oil shock keeps pressure on Yen – OCBC
item.description: OCBC strategists Sim Moh Siong and Christopher Wong highlight that rising Oil prices are worsening Japan’s terms of trade, fiscal risks and policy uncertainty, keeping the Japanese Yen (JPY) under pressure. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Forex Today: Australian Inflation Drops Unexpectedly - 25 March 2026
item.description: Australian CPI Falls to 3.7%; UK CPI 3.0% as Expected; Markets More Convinced of Trump Peace Talk, Stabilising Crude Oil, Stocks & Gold Higher; Iran Allowing "Non-Hostile" Ships Hormuz Transit Fuente: DailyForex

item.title: UK: Persistent price pressures challenge BoE – Deutsche Bank
item.description: Deutsche Bank’s Chief UK Economist Sanjay Raja notes that UK inflation data broadly matched expectations, with Headline CPI at 3% and stronger Services CPI driving a firmer Core CPI outcome. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Forex Hoy: La Inflación Australiana Cae Inesperadamente - 25 marzo 2026
item.description: El IPC australiano cae al 3,7%; el IPC del Reino Unido al 3,0%, como se esperaba; los mercados están más convencidos de las conversaciones de paz de Trump, lo que estabiliza el petróleo crudo, las acciones y el oro suben; Irán Permitir el tránsito de barcos «no hostiles» por el estrecho de Ormuz. Fuente: DailyForex ES

item.title: UK Inflation Unchanged at 3.0% as Services Keep Price Pressure Elevated
item.description: UK inflation held steady in February, with headline CPI unchanged at 3.0% yoy, in line with expectations. On a monthly basis, CPI rose 0.4%, matching the pace seen a year earlier. However, underlying pressures remain firm. Core CPI ticked up from 3.1% yoy to 3.2% yoy, coming in above expectations. While goods inflation held steady […] The pos... Fuente: ActionForex

item.title: UK February CPI +3.0% vs +3.0% y/y expected
item.description: Prior +3.0% Core CPI +3.2% vs +3.1% y/y expected Prior +3.1% To preface the report, it is one that doesn't matter all too much since it is before the US-Iran conflict took place. Still, it does provide a bit of backdrop of what kind of benchmark UK inflation is sitting at before the spike in energy prices. Core annual inflation remains sticky above... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Global markets swing on US–Iran war headlines as risk-on rally falters – a cross analysis on S&P 500, US Dollar Index, AUD/USD, and WTI crude
item.description: S P 500 and Nasdaq 100 remain volatile as conflicting US–Iran war headlines drive sharp reversals. The US Dollar Index stays supported, AUD/USD weakens, and WTI crude oil holds key support, signaling fragile sentiment and no confirmed risk-on trend. Fuente: MarketPulse

item.title: Japan reportedly calls on IEA to coordinate release of additional oil stockpile
item.description: As a reminder, Japan is one of the most heavily impacted nations by the US-Iran conflict. That as it is unable to secure oil supply from the Middle East amid the de facto closure of the Strait of Hormuz. And for a country ever so reliant on energy imports, it's a massive blow to the economy. Japan prime minister Takaichi and IEA chief Birol held ta... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: Australia’s February CPI Came in Soft, but AUD Dropped as Iran War Clouded Inflation Outlook
item.description: Australia’s February CPI came in soft at 3.7%, but the Aussie dropped as the Iran war threatens to push inflation higher. Fuente: BabyPips

item.title: AUD/USD: The technical squeeze between 0.6980 and 0.7070
item.description: AUD/USD remains under pressure after softer Australian CPI data (3.7%) failed to dispel RBA rate hike expectations. The pair is technically "coiled" between 0.6980 and 0.7070, with US Dollar moves and geopolitical sentiment driving near-term direction. We analyze the bearish and bullish breakout cases. Fuente: MarketPulse

item.title: PBoC adds liquidity with CNY 500bn MLF, extends net injection streak (450bn mature)
item.description: PBoC extends liquidity support with 13th straight MLF net injection Summary: PBoC to inject CNY 500bn via 1-year MLF, vs CNY 450bn maturing Results in CNY 50bn net liquidity injection Marks 13th straight month of net injections Conducted via variable-rate, multiple-price auction Signals continued policy support for liquidity and credit Reinforces a... Fuente: ForexLive
